sublevels.topic: Hello World & Basic Syntax — Intermediate Level
sublevels.theory:
**Java Compilation & Execution:**
1. Source code `.java` → compiled to bytecode `.class` by `javac`
2. JVM executes the `.class` bytecode

**`printf` for formatted output:**
```java
System.out.printf("Name: %s, Age: %d, GPA: %.2f%n", name, age, gpa);
```

**`System.err`** — standard error stream, always visible even when stdout is redirected.

**`String.format()`** — creates a formatted string:
```java
String s = String.format("Score: %d%%", 95);
```

**Text blocks (Java 15+):**
```java
String json = """
    { "key": "value" }
    """;
```

questions.question: What format specifier is used for an integer in `printf`?

What are text blocks in Java 15+?
options: Multi-line string literals using triple quotes
questions.answer: Multi-line string literals using triple quotes

questions.question: What is JIT compilation?
options: JVM compiling bytecode to native machine code at runtime for performance
questions.answer: JVM compiling bytecode to native machine code at runtime for performance

questions.question: What is `System.err` used for?
options: Standard error stream — always visible even when stdout redirected
questions.answer: Standard error stream — always visible even when stdout redirected

sublevels.topic: Hello World & Basic Syntax — Expert Level
sublevels.theory:
**Java Platform Architecture:**
- **JDK** — Java Development Kit (compiler + JRE)
- **JRE** — Java Runtime Environment (JVM + libraries)
- **JVM** — Java Virtual Machine (executes bytecode)

**`record` (Java 16+):** concise immutable data class:
```java
record Point(int x, int y) {}
Point p = new Point(3, 4);
System.out.println(p.x()); // accessor auto-generated
```

**Sealed classes (Java 17+):** restrict which classes can extend:
```java
sealed interface Shape permits Circle, Square {}
```

**`var` (Java 10+):** local variable type inference:
`var list = new ArrayList<String>();`

questions.question: What is a Java record (Java 16+)?
options: Concise immutable data class with auto-generated constructor, accessors, equals, hashCode, toString
questions.answer: Concise immutable data class with auto-generated constructor, accessors, equals, hashCode, toString

questions.question: What does `var` do in Java 10+?
options: Declares a variable without a type
Local variable type inference — compiler infers the type
questions.answer: Local variable type inference — compiler infers the type

questions.question: What are sealed classes (Java 17+) used for?
options: Restricting which classes can extend/implement them — enables exhaustive pattern matching
questions.answer: Restricting which classes can extend/implement them — enables exhaustive pattern matching

questions.question: What is `System.out.println` backed by internally?
options: A `PrintStream` wrapping a `BufferedOutputStream` wrapping `FileOutputStream` for stdout
questions.answer: A `PrintStream` wrapping a `BufferedOutputStream` wrapping `FileOutputStream` for stdout

questions.question: What is `--enable-preview` flag used for?
options: Enables preview features not yet final in the current Java release
questions.answer: Enables preview features not yet final in the current Java release

questions.question: What is GraalVM native image?
options: Ahead-of-time compile Java to a native executable — faster startup, less memory
questions.answer: Ahead-of-time compile Java to a native executable — faster startup, less memory

questions.question: What is Project Loom (Java 21)?
options: Virtual threads — lightweight threads managed by JVM for high-concurrency I/O
questions.answer: Virtual threads — lightweight threads managed by JVM for high-concurrency I/O

questions.question: What is the `module-info.java` file for (Java 9+)?
options: Defines a module — specifies which packages are exported and which modules are required
questions.answer: Defines a module — specifies which packages are exported and which modules are required

questions.question: What does `Pattern matching for instanceof` (Java 16+) let you do?
options: Combine instanceof check and cast: `if (obj instanceof String s) { use s; }`
questions.answer: Combine instanceof check and cast: `if (obj instanceof String s) { use s; }`
